top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP NOT BETWEEN 6.0 AND 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_not_normal_TP
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP < 6.0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_female_not_normal_tp
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP NOT BETWEEN 6.0 AND 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_not_normal_TP
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP < 6.0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_female_not_normal_tp
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND (l.TP < 6.0 OR l.TP > 8.0) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_female_not_normal_TP
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP NOT BETWEEN 6.0 AND 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_not_normal_TP
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP < 6.0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_female_not_normal_tp
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND (l.TP < 6.0 OR l.TP > 8.0) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_female_not_normal_TP
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.TP NOT BETWEEN 6.0 AND 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_not_normal_TP
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'F';
